---
title: "Callout-solution Example"
filters:
  - callout-solution

teaching:
  show-solutions: true
  default-solution-title: "This is a solution title"

---

## Introduction

This filter adds a callout-block that is only visible when the 
rendered document or project has it enabled through metadata

```
teaching:
  show-solutions: true
  default-solution-title: "This is a solution title"
```

The block is added like other Quarto callouts

````default
::: {.callout-solution}
This block is a solution, only shown when run when `show-solution` is set to `true` in the document or project metadata.

```default
teaching:
  show-solutions: true
```

:::
````


::: {.callout-solution}
This block is a solution, only shown when run when `show-solution` 
is set to `true` in the document or project metadata.

```default
teaching:
  show-solutions: true
```

:::

## Example overwriting the example

The `default-solution-title` parameter controls the default title, but it can be overwritten for individual blocks 

````default
::: {.callout-solution title="My title"}
This block has had a title overwrite set 
::: 
````

::: {.callout-solution title="My title"}
This block has had a title overwrite set 
:::
